_comment: Copy to config.json and edit. Non-secret run params only; secrets go in .env.

targets._locations_note: Your target cities/regions, matched as case-insensitive substrings of a job's location (a state token like ', ny' matches any NY city). Leave [] to not filter by location.
targets._exclude_title_terms_note: Hide any job whose title contains one of these (substring, case-insensitive; pad with spaces to scope a bare word). Leave [] to hide nothing. Example: ["senior", "director", "engineer"].
targets._note: work_authorization + salary_floor are advisory: they add a heads-up reason on a match, they do not change the score.

sources._note: Greenhouse/Lever take company slugs (boards.greenhouse.io/<slug>). Workday takes a careers URL (…myworkdayjobs.com/…).
